final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that the loan duration is short, because extended durations correspond to higher default risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the checking account balance is negative, because negative balances reflect financial instability, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that there is no checking account, because the dataset associates this category with lower estimated risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n대출 기간이 짧은 것은 일반적으로 채무 불이행 위험이 높아지는 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
계좌 잔액 부족은 재정 불안정을 나타내므로 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 분류합니다 [2].
출금 계좌 없음은 위험 감소 요인으로 간주되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 해석합니다 [3].
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
